prompt: UI가 리디자인돼서 셀렉터가 다 바뀌었어. 테스트 전부 깨졌는데 한번에 고쳐줘
assertions: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-healer
Mentions test_run to identify all failing tests
Mentions test_debug to pause at each failure point
Uses browser_generate_locator to get updated selectors
Updates selectors preferring getByRole/getByText over CSS selectors
Fixes tests one at a time and re-runs test_run after each fix
